instances.prompt: Instrumental loop only. 95 BPM boom bap hip hop. Warm soul chord chop feel, dusty muffled drum break, unquantized human swing, muted kick, crispy snare, swung hi-hats, round electric bass. Soulful confident head-nod groove. Sparse room for voiceover. Vinyl warmth, lo-fi sampler texture. Seamless loop ending.
